x-scalar-sdk-installation.description: Install our **ONLYOFFICE SDK** for Node.js from npm:
Install our **ONLYOFFICE SDK** for Python app from pip:
Install our **ONLYOFFICE SDK** for .Net from nuget:

parameters.name: subjectId
parameters.description: The filter by user ID.

parameters.name: withoutTags
parameters.description: Specifies whether to search by tags or not.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: The tags in the serialized format.

parameters.name: excludeSubject
parameters.description: Specifies whether to exclude search by user or group ID.

parameters.name: subjectFilter
parameters.description: The filter by user (Owner - 0, Member - 1).

parameters.name: quotaFilter
parameters.description: The filter by quota (All - 0, Default - 1, Custom - 2).

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Specifies the maximum number of items to retrieve.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: The index from which to start retrieving the room content.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Specifies the field by which the room content should be sorted.

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: The order in which the results are sorted.

parameters.name: filterValue
parameters.description: The text filter value used to refine search or query operations.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The room ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The room ID.

requestBody.description: The request parameters for updating a room.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The room ID.

requestBody.description: The parameters for deleting a room.

put.summary: Change the AI agent quota limit
put.description: Changes the quota limit for the AI agents with the IDs specified in the request.

200.description: List of AI agents with the detailed information

put.summary: Reset the AI agents quota limit
put.description: Resets the quota limit for the AI agents with the IDs specified in the request.

200.description: List of AI agents with the detailed information

post.description:
Creates a new AI chat session within the specified room and sends the initial message to the configured AI provider.
The response is delivered as a Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream containing completion chunks (text deltas, tool calls, tool results, and message lifecycle events)
with periodic keep-alive pings every 5 seconds. File references can be included as context for the AI model.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: The identifier of the room in which to create the new AI chat session.

requestBody.description: The initial message and optional file attachments.

400.description: The message is empty or one or more file attachments could not be processed

403.description: You don't have enough permission to access the chat in this room

404.description: The specified room or AI provider was not found

get.summary: Get AI chats in a room
get.description:
Returns a paginated list of AI chat sessions that belong to the current user within the specified room.
Supports pagination via the startIndex and count query parameters. The total number of chats is included in the response metadata.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: The identifier of the room whose AI chat sessions are to be listed.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: The number of items to skip before returning results (zero-based offset). Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return per page. Defaults to 100.

200.description: Paginated list of chat sessions in the room

403.description: You don't have enough permission to access chats in this room

404.description: The room with the specified ID was not found

post.summary: Send a message to an existing AI chat
post.description:
Appends a new user message to an existing chat session and streams the AI assistant's response.
The full conversation history of the chat is sent to the AI provider to maintain context.
The response is delivered as a Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream with periodic keep-alive pings.
File references can optionally be attached to provide additional context.

parameters.name: chatId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the existing AI chat session to continue.

requestBody.description: The message and optional file attachments.

400.description: The message is empty or one or more file attachments could not be processed

403.description: You don't have enough permission to access the chat in this room

404.description: The specified chat, room, or AI provider was not found

get.summary: Get messages of an AI chat
get.description:
Returns a paginated list of messages from an AI chat session owned by the current user.
Each message includes its role (user or assistant), content blocks (text, tool calls, attachments), and timestamp.
Supports pagination via the startIndex and count query parameters. The total number of messages is included in the response metadata.

parameters.name: chatId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the AI chat session whose messages are to be listed.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: The number of items to skip before returning results (zero-based offset). Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return per page. Defaults to 100.

200.description: Paginated list of messages in the chat

404.description: The chat with the specified ID was not found or does not belong to the current user

put.description:
Updates the display title of an existing AI chat session owned by the current user.
The new name must not exceed 255 characters.

parameters.name: chatId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the AI chat session to rename.

404.description: The chat with the specified ID was not found or does not belong to the current user

get.summary: Get an AI chat by ID
get.description:
Retrieves the metadata of a single AI chat session, including its title, creation date, and the user who created it.
Only the chat owner can access their own chat sessions.

parameters.name: chatId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the AI chat session to retrieve.

404.description: The chat with the specified ID was not found or does not belong to the current user

delete.description:
Permanently deletes an AI chat session along with all of its messages.
Only the chat owner can delete their own chat sessions. This action cannot be undone.

parameters.name: chatId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the AI chat session to delete.

404.description: The chat with the specified ID was not found or does not belong to the current user

post.summary: Export AI chat messages to a file
post.description:
Exports the entire message history of an AI chat session and saves it as a document in the specified folder.
The exported file is created with the provided title. Only the chat owner can export their own chat sessions.

parameters.name: chatId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the AI chat session to export.

requestBody.description: The export parameters including destination folder and file title.

200.description: The chat messages were successfully exported to the specified folder

404.description: The chat with the specified ID was not found or does not belong to the current user

get.description:
Returns the list of AI models available for chat conversations.
Optionally filters the results to models from a specific provider when the provider query parameter is specified.
Each model entry includes the provider ID, provider display name, and the model identifier.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: The optional AI provider identifier to filter models by. When set to 0, models from all providers are returned.

post.summary: Submit a tool execution permission decision
post.description:
Provides the user's approval or denial decision for a pending MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool execution request.
When an AI assistant attempts to invoke an external tool that requires explicit user consent,
the client receives a permission prompt via the SSE stream. This endpoint is used to submit the user's decision
so that the AI chat session can proceed accordingly.

parameters.name: callId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the pending tool execution call awaiting a permission decision.

200.description: The permission decision was successfully recorded

put.summary: Update user chat settings for a room
put.description:
Saves the current user's personal AI chat preferences for the specified room.
Currently supports toggling the web search capability, which allows the AI assistant to search the internet when generating responses.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: The identifier of the room whose chat settings are to be updated.

403.description: You don't have enough permission to access chats in this room

404.description: The room with the specified ID was not found

get.summary: Get user chat settings for a room
get.description:
Retrieves the current user's personal AI chat preferences for the specified room,
including whether web search is enabled for AI-assisted responses.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: The identifier of the room whose chat settings are to be retrieved.

403.description: You don't have enough permission to access chats in this room

404.description: The room with the specified ID was not found

post.description:
Registers a new custom MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for the current tenant.
The system validates the server name (only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens are allowed),
checks that it is not reserved or already taken, and then attempts to connect to the provided endpoint
to verify reachability and credentials before persisting the configuration.
Requires DocSpace administrator privileges.

400.description: Invalid server name, reserved name, duplicate name, incorrect credentials, or invalid endpoint URL

403.description: You don't have permission to manage MCP servers

delete.description:
Permanently removes one or more MCP servers from the current tenant by their IDs.
All room associations and connection data for the deleted servers are also cleaned up.
This action is irreversible. Requires DocSpace administrator privileges.

403.description: You don't have permission to manage MCP servers

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of all MCP servers registered for the current tenant, including both
enabled and disabled servers. Each entry contains the full configuration (endpoint, headers,
icon, type, and status). Supports pagination via the startIndex and count query parameters.
The total number of servers is included in the response metadata.
Requires DocSpace administrator privileges.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: The number of items to skip before returning results (zero-based offset). Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return per page. Defaults to 100.

200.description: Paginated list of all registered MCP servers

403.description: You don't have permission to manage MCP servers

put.description:
Updates the configuration of an existing custom MCP server identified by its unique ID.
Any combination of fields (name, description, endpoint, headers, icon) can be updated in a single request.
If the endpoint or headers are changed, the system re-validates connectivity by attempting to reach
the new endpoint before saving. Name uniqueness and format rules are enforced on every update.
Requires DocSpace administrator privileges.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the MCP server to update.

400.description: Invalid server name, reserved name, duplicate name, incorrect credentials, or invalid endpoint URL

403.description: You don't have permission to manage MCP servers

404.description: The MCP server with the specified ID was not found

get.summary: Get an MCP server by ID
get.description:
Retrieves a summary view of a single MCP server by its unique identifier, including its name,
type, enabled state, and icon. This endpoint returns a compact representation without
sensitive details such as endpoint URL or authentication headers.
Requires DocSpace administrator privileges.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the MCP server to retrieve.

403.description: You don't have permission to manage MCP servers

404.description: The MCP server with the specified ID was not found

put.summary: Enable or disable an MCP server
put.description:
Toggles the enabled/disabled state of an MCP server. When a server is disabled, it becomes
unavailable for assignment to rooms and will not be used during AI chat sessions.
Enabling a previously disabled server restores its availability across the tenant.
Requires DocSpace administrator privileges.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the MCP server whose status is being changed.

200.description: MCP server with the updated status

403.description: You don't have permission to manage MCP servers

404.description: The MCP server with the specified ID was not found

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of MCP servers that are currently active (enabled) and available for
assignment to rooms. Only servers in the enabled state are included. Each entry contains a compact
summary with the server name, type, icon, and status. Supports pagination via startIndex and count.
The total count of available servers is included in the response metadata.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: The number of items to skip before returning results (zero-based offset). Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return per page. Defaults to 100.

200.description: Paginated list of active MCP servers available for room assignment

post.summary: Assign MCP servers to a room
post.description:
Associates one or more MCP servers with a specific room, making them available for AI chat sessions
within that room. A maximum of 5 MCP servers can be assigned to a single room. If OAuth-based servers
are included, each room member will need to individually authorize their connection.
Requires room edit permissions.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: Identifier of the room to which MCP servers will be assigned.

200.description: List of MCP server statuses after assignment

400.description: The maximum number of servers per room has been exceeded

403.description: You don't have enough permission to perform the operation

404.description: The room with the specified ID was not found

get.summary: Get MCP servers assigned to a room
get.description:
Returns the list of MCP servers currently assigned to the specified room along with their connection
statuses for the current user. For OAuth-based servers, the connection status reflects whether the
current user has completed authorization. Requires access to the room's AI chat.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: Identifier of the room whose assigned MCP servers are being retrieved.

200.description: List of MCP server statuses in the room

403.description: You don't have enough permission to perform the operation

404.description: The room with the specified ID was not found

delete.summary: Remove MCP servers from a room
delete.description:
Detaches one or more MCP servers from the specified room. After removal, the servers will no longer
be available in AI chat sessions within this room. Existing connections and tool configurations for
the removed servers are also cleaned up. Requires room edit permissions.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: Identifier of the room from which MCP servers will be removed.

204.description: MCP servers were successfully removed from the room

403.description: You don't have enough permission to perform the operation

404.description: The room with the specified ID was not found

put.summary: Configure MCP server tools in a room
put.description:
Updates the set of disabled tools for an MCP server within a specific room. Pass a list of tool names
that should be disabled — all other tools exposed by the server will remain enabled. This allows
room administrators to restrict which MCP capabilities are available during AI chat sessions.
Requires room edit permissions.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: Identifier of the room containing the MCP server.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the MCP server whose tools are being configured.

200.description: Complete list of tools with their enabled/disabled states

403.description: You don't have enough permission to perform the operation

404.description: The room or MCP server was not found

get.summary: Get MCP server tools in a room
get.description:
Retrieves the full list of tools exposed by an MCP server within the context of a specific room,
along with each tool's enabled or disabled state. Disabled tools will not be invoked during
AI chat sessions in this room. Requires access to the room's AI chat.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: Identifier of the room containing the MCP server.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the MCP server whose tools are being retrieved.

200.description: List of tools with their enabled/disabled states

403.description: You don't have enough permission to perform the operation

404.description: The room or MCP server was not found

post.summary: Connect an OAuth-based MCP server in a room
post.description:
Completes the OAuth authorization flow for an MCP server within a specific room on behalf of the
current user. The authorization code obtained from the OAuth provider must be passed in the request body.
Upon successful token exchange, the system verifies connectivity to the server and stores
the credentials for the current user. Requires room edit permissions.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: Identifier of the room containing the MCP server.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the MCP server to connect.

requestBody.description:
The request body containing additional data necessary for connecting to the server,
such as authentication or operation-specific information.

200.description: MCP server connection status after authorization

400.description: The provided authorization code is invalid

403.description: You don't have enough permission to perform the operation

404.description: The room or MCP server connection was not found

post.summary: Disconnect an MCP server in a room
post.description:
Revokes the current user's OAuth connection to an MCP server within the specified room. After
disconnection, the server's tools will no longer be available to this user in AI chat sessions
until they re-authorize. Other room members' connections are not affected.
Requires room edit permissions.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: Identifier of the room containing the MCP server.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the MCP server to disconnect from.

200.description: MCP server connection status after disconnection

403.description: You don't have enough permission to perform the operation

404.description: The room or MCP server connection was not found

post.summary: Export a single AI message to a document
post.description:
Exports a specific AI chat message as a document into the specified folder. The system verifies that the message exists
and belongs to a chat accessible by the current user, then publishes an asynchronous export task to the event bus.
The exported document will be created in the target folder with the given title once the background task completes.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the AI chat message to export.

requestBody.description: The export parameters including destination folder and file title.

200.description: The message export task has been successfully queued for background processing

400.description: The message identifier is invalid (must be greater than 0)

404.description: The specified message was not found or the current user does not have access to it

post.description:
Registers a new AI provider for the current tenant by specifying its type, display title, API endpoint URL, and authentication key.
The provider becomes available for AI chat conversations after creation. This action is rate-limited.

403.description: You don't have enough permission to manage providers

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of AI providers configured for the current tenant.
Supports pagination via the startIndex and count query parameters. The total number of providers is included in the response metadata.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: The number of items to skip before returning results (zero-based offset). Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return per page. Defaults to 100.

delete.description:
Permanently deletes one or more AI providers by their identifiers.
All specified providers are removed from the current tenant. This action cannot be undone.

403.description: You don't have enough permission to manage providers

put.description:
Updates the configuration of an existing AI provider, including its display title, API endpoint URL, and authentication key.
Only the fields provided in the request body will be updated. This action is rate-limited.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier of the AI provider to update.

requestBody.description: The AI provider configuration parameters to update.

403.description: You don't have enough permission to manage providers

404.description: The provider with the specified ID was not found

get.description:
Returns the list of AI provider types that are available for configuration on the current instance.
Each entry includes the provider type identifier and the default API endpoint URL.

200.description: List of available AI provider types

put.description:
Sets the default AI provider and model for the current tenant.
The specified provider and model will be used as the default for all new AI chat sessions within the tenant.

403.description: You don't have enough permission to manage providers

404.description: Provider not found

get.description:
Returns the default AI provider and model configured for the current tenant.
Returns null if the tenant does not have any registered providers.

200.description: Default provider information or null if not set

put.description:
Configures the web search integration for AI chat sessions at the portal level.
Allows enabling or disabling web search, selecting the search engine type, and providing the API key for the chosen engine.
Only portal administrators can modify these settings.

get.description:
Retrieves the current web search integration settings for AI chat sessions,
including whether web search is enabled, the configured search engine type, and whether the API key needs to be reset.

put.description:
Configures the embedding provider used for document vectorization at the portal level.
Vectorization enables semantic search and knowledge retrieval capabilities in AI chat sessions.
Allows selecting the embedding provider type and providing the API key for the chosen provider.
Only portal administrators can modify these settings.

get.description:
Retrieves the current embedding provider settings used for document vectorization,
including the configured provider type and whether the API key needs to be reset.

Retrieves the combined AI configuration for the current portal, including the status of web search,
vectorization, and AI readiness, along with tool names and the portal MCP server identifier.

post.description:
Submits the specified files for vectorization. Each file is processed asynchronously by the configured embedding provider
and indexed for semantic search in AI chat sessions. Only files accessible to the current user can be vectorized.

requestBody.description: The vectorization parameters including file identifiers.

200.description: The vectorization task was successfully submitted

name.description: Unique display name for the server. Only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens are allowed. Maximum 128 characters.

description.description: Human-readable description of the server's purpose and capabilities. Maximum 255 characters.
description.example: Custom MCP server for project management tools

endpoint.description: Base URL of the MCP server endpoint. Must be a valid, reachable URL. The system will verify connectivity during registration.

headers.description: Optional HTTP headers to include with every request to the MCP server (e.g., authentication tokens or API keys).

icon.description: Optional Base64-encoded icon image for the server. Used as the visual identifier in the UI.

AddMcpServerRequestBody.description: Parameters for creating a new custom MCP server.

servers.description: Set of unique identifiers of MCP servers to associate with the room. A maximum of 5 servers can be assigned per room.

AddRoomServersRequestBody.description: Parameters specifying which MCP servers to assign to the room.

items.description: The list of file entry items.

count.description: The total number of items in the response

links.description: List of links related to the response

status.description: HTTP status code of the response

statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the response (duplicate of status)

url.description: API endpoint URL for the AI provider.

needReset.description: Indicates whether the provider's API key needs to be reset.

isDefault.description: Indicates whether this provider is the default provider for the tenant.

count.description: The total number of items in the response

links.description: List of links related to the response

status.description: HTTP status code of the response

statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the response (duplicate of status)

webSearchEnabled.description: Indicates whether web search is enabled for AI chat sessions.

webSearchNeedReset.description: Indicates whether the web search API key needs to be reconfigured.

vectorizationEnabled.description: Indicates whether document vectorization is enabled.

vectorizationNeedReset.description: Indicates whether the embedding provider API key needs to be reconfigured.

aiReady.description: Indicates whether the AI subsystem is fully configured and operational.

aiReadyNeedReset.description: Indicates whether the AI provider API key needs to be reconfigured.

portalMcpServerId.description: The unique identifier of the portal-level MCP server, if configured.

embeddingModel.description: The name of the embedding model used for document vectorization.

knowledgeSearchToolName.description: The tool name used by the AI assistant for knowledge base search.

webSearchToolName.description: The tool name used by the AI assistant for web search.

webCrawlingToolName.description: The tool name used by the AI assistant for web page crawling.

generateDocxToolName.description: The tool name used by the AI to launch docx creation in the editor.

generateFormToolName.description: The tool name used by the AI assistant to launch form creation in the editor.

generatePresentationToolName.description: The tool name used by the AI assistant to launch presentation creation in the editor.

count.description: The total number of items in the response

links.description: List of links related to the response

status.description: HTTP status code of the response

statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the response (duplicate of status)

ApiDateTime.description: The API date and time parameters.

count.description: The total number of items in the response

links.description: List of links related to the response

status.description: HTTP status code of the response

statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the response (duplicate of status)

id.description: The unique identifier of the AI chat session.

title.description: The display title of the chat session.

internal.description: Specifies whether the provider is internal or not.

count.description: The total number of items in the response

links.description: List of links related to the response

status.description: HTTP status code of the response

statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the response (duplicate of status)

code.description: OAuth authorization code received from the provider's redirect. Used to exchange for access and refresh tokens.

ConnectServerRequestBody.description: Parameters for completing an OAuth connection to an MCP server.

message.description: The user message to append to the conversation.

contextFolderId.description: The optional collection of file identifiers to attach as context for the AI model.

ContinueChatBody.description: Parameters for continuing an AI chat session.

indexing.description: Specifies whether to create a room with indexing.

denyDownload.description: Specifies whether to deny downloads from the room.

private.description: Specifies whether the room to be created is private or not.

attachDefaultTools.description: Specifies whether to attach default tools to the agent or not.

CreateAgentRequestDto.description: Request to create a new AI agent room.

title.description: The display title for the AI provider.

url.description: The API endpoint URL for the AI provider. Required for OpenAiCompatible type; optional for other types that have default URLs.

key.description: The authentication API key for the AI provider.

CreateProviderRequestDto.description: Request parameters for creating a new AI provider.

defaultModel.description: Default model identifier used with this provider.

count.description: The total number of items in the response

links.description: List of links related to the response

status.description: HTTP status code of the response

statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the response (duplicate of status)

deleteAfter.description: Specifies whether to delete a room after the editing session is finished or not.

DeleteRoomRequest.description: The parameters for deleting a room.

servers.description: Set of unique identifiers of MCP servers to remove from the room. Associated connections and tool configurations will also be cleaned up.

DeleteRoomServersRequestBody.description: Parameters specifying which MCP servers to detach from the room.

servers.description: Set of unique identifiers of the MCP servers to permanently remove. All room associations and connection data will also be deleted.

DeleteServersRequestBody.description: Parameters specifying which MCP servers to delete.

oneOf.description: [Created - Created, Running - Running, Completed - Completed, Canceled - Canceled, Failted - Failted]

displayName.description: The HTML-encoded user's display name formatted according to the default format for the current culture.

hasAvatar.description: Specifies if the user has an avatar or not.

isAnonim.description: Specifies if the user is anonymous or not.

folderId.description: The identifier of the destination folder where the exported document will be saved.

title.description: The file name (without extension) to use for the exported document.

ExportChatRequestBodyInteger.description: Parameters for exporting an AI chat session to a document.

folderId.description: The identifier of the destination folder where the exported document will be saved.

title.description: The file name (without extension) to use for the exported document.

ExportMessageRequestBodyInteger.description: Parameters for exporting an AI chat message to a document.

shared.description: Specifies if the file entry is shared via link or not.

sharedForUser.description: Specifies if the file entry is shared for user or not.

parentShared.description: Indicates whether the parent entity is shared.

providerItem.description: Specifies if the file entry provider is specified or not.

providerKey.description: The provider key of the file entry.

providerId.description: The provider ID of the file entry.

order.description: The order of the file entry.

isFavorite.description: Specifies if the file is a favorite or not.

rootFolderId.description: The root folder ID of the file entry.

originId.description: The origin ID of the file entry.

originRoomId.description: The origin room ID of the file entry.

originTitle.description: The origin title of the file entry.

originRoomTitle.description: The origin room title of the file entry.

canShare.description: Specifies if the file entry can be shared or not.

shareSettings.description: A dictionary representing the sharing settings for the file entry.

security.description: The actions that can be performed with the file entry.

availableShareRights.description: The available external rights of the file entry.

requestToken.description: The request token of the file entry.

external.description: Specifies if the folder can be accessed via an external link or not.

isLinkExpired.description: Indicates whether the shareable link associated with the file or folder has expired.

progress.description: The file operation progress in percentage.

finished.description: Specifies if the file operation is finished or not.

files.description: The list of files of the file operation.

folders.description: The list of folders of the file operation.

oneOf.description: [Move - Move, Copy - Copy, Delete - Delete, Download - Download, MarkAsRead - MarkAsRead, Import - Import, Convert - Convert, Duplicate - Duplicate]
[0 - Move, 1 - Copy, 2 - Delete, 3 - Download, 4 - MarkAsRead, 5 - Import, 6 - Convert, 7 - Duplicate]

count.description: The total number of items in the response

links.description: List of links related to the response

status.description: HTTP status code of the response

statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the response (duplicate of status)

oneOf.description: [None - None, ReadWrite - Read and write, Read - Read, Restrict - Restrict, Varies - Varies, Review - Review, Comment - Comment, FillForms - Fill forms, CustomFilter - Custom filter, RoomManager - Room manager, Editing - Editing, ContentCreator - Content creator]
[0 - None, 1 - Read and write, 2 - Read, 3 - Restrict, 4 - Varies, 5 - Review, 6 - Comment, 7 - Fill forms, 8 - Custom filter, 9 - Room manager, 10 - Editing, 11 - Content creator]

shareTo.description: The ID of the user to whom the file will be shared.

FileShareParams.description: The collection of file sharing parameters.

files.description: The list of files in the folder.

folders.description: The list of folders in the folder.

count.description: The number of folder elements.

total.description: The total number of elements in the folder.

new.description: The new element index in the folder.

count.description: The total number of items in the response

links.description: List of links related to the response

status.description: HTTP status code of the response

statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the response (duplicate of status)

parentId.description: The parent folder ID of the folder.

filesCount.description: The number of files that the folder contains.

foldersCount.description: The number of folders that the folder contains.

isShareable.description: Specifies if the folder can be shared or not.

new.description: The new element index in the folder.

mute.description: Specifies if the folder notifications are enabled or not.

tags.description: The list of tags of the folder.

pinned.description: Specifies if the folder is pinned or not.

private.description: Specifies if the folder is private or not.

indexing.description: Specifies if the folder is indexed or not.

denyDownload.description: Specifies if the folder can be downloaded or not.

inRoom.description: Specifies if the folder is placed in the room or not.

isCustomQuota.description: Specifies if the folder room has a custom quota or not.

usedSpace.description: How much folder space is used (counter).

passwordProtected.description: Specifies if the folder is password protected or not.

expired.description: Specifies if an external link to the folder is expired or not.

[0 - PortalAi, 1 - OpenAi, 2 - TogetherAi, 3 - OpenAiCompatible, 4 - Anthropic, 5 - OpenRouter, 6 - DeepSeek, 7 - XAi, 8 - GoogleAi]

ids.description: The set of AI provider identifiers to delete.

RemoveProviderRequestDto.description: Request parameters for deleting one or more AI providers.

name.description: The new display name for the chat session (maximum 255 characters).

RenameChatBody.description: Parameters for renaming an AI chat session.

deletePermanently.description: Specifies whether to permanently delete the room data or not.

value.description: Specifies the time period value of the room data lifetime.

enabled.description: Specifies whether the room data lifetime setting is enabled or not.

oneOf.description: [FillingFormsRoom - Form filling room, EditingRoom - Collaboration room, CustomRoom - Custom room, PublicRoom - Public room, VirtualDataRoom - Virtual data room, AiRoom - AI Room]
[1 - Form filling room, 2 - Collaboration room, 5 - Custom room, 6 - Public room, 8 - Virtual data room, 9 - AI Room]
[Custom - Custom, DocSpace - DocSpace, Github - Github, Box - Box]

defaultModel.description: Default model identifier to use with this provider.

SetDefaultProviderRequestDto.description: Request parameters for setting the default AI provider.

key.description: The API key for the selected embedding provider. Pass null to keep the existing key unchanged.

SetEmbeddingConfigRequestBody.description: Parameters for configuring the embedding provider.

disabledTools.description: List of tool names to disable. Tools not included in this list will remain enabled. Pass an empty list to enable all tools.

SetMcpToolsRequestBody.description: Parameters for updating the disabled tools list of an MCP server in a room.

enabled.description: Set to true to enable the server (making it available for room assignment), or false to disable it.

SetServerStatusRequestBody.description: Parameters for toggling the MCP server status.

webSearchEnabled.description: Indicates whether the AI assistant is allowed to perform web searches when generating responses.

SetUserChatSettingsRequestBody.description: Parameters for updating user chat settings.

enabled.description: Indicates whether web search is enabled for AI chat sessions.

key.description: The API key for the selected web search engine. Pass null to keep the existing key unchanged.

SetWebSearchSettingsRequestBody.description: Parameters for configuring web search settings.

SortOrder.description: The order in which the results are sorted.

message.description: The initial user message to send to the AI assistant.
message.example: Hello, can you help me with this document?

contextFolderId.description: The optional collection of file identifiers to attach as context for the AI model.

StartNewChatBody.description: Parameters for starting a new AI chat session.

ToolDecisionRequestBody.description: Parameters for the tool execution permission decision.

title.description: The new display title for the AI provider. If null, the title is not changed.

url.description: The new API endpoint URL for the AI provider. If null, the URL is not changed.

key.description: The new authentication API key for the AI provider. If null, the key is not changed.

UpdateProviderBody.description: Parameters for updating an AI provider's configuration.

indexing.description: Specifies whether to create a third-party room with indexing.

denyDownload.description: Specifies whether to deny downloads from the third-party room.

UpdateRoomRequest.description: The request parameters for updating a room.

UpdateRoomsQuotaRequestDtoInteger.description: The request parameters for updating the room quota.

UpdateRoomsRoomIdsRequestDtoInteger.description: The request parameters for updating the rooms.

name.description: New display name for the server. Only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens are allowed. Maximum 128 characters.

description.description: New human-readable description of the server's purpose. Maximum 255 characters.

endpoint.description: New base URL of the MCP server endpoint. If changed, the system will re-verify connectivity before saving.

headers.description: New HTTP headers to include with every request. If changed alongside the endpoint, connectivity is re-verified.

updateIcon.description: Set to true to update the server icon. When true, the Icon field value (or null to remove) will be applied.

icon.description: New Base64-encoded icon image for the server, or null to remove the existing icon. Only applied when UpdateIcon is true.

UpdateServerRequestBody.description: Parameters for updating an existing MCP server. All fields are optional — only provided fields will be modified.

webSearchEnabled.description: Indicates whether the AI assistant is allowed to perform web searches when generating responses in this room.
